seo.title: Vigil Services Ltd — care, staffing, security and cleaning
seo.description: Vigil Services Ltd is the parent group behind four specialist divisions — care and support, healthcare staffing, security and commercial cleaning. Choose the service you need.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Vigil Services Ltd
fields.sub: Four specialist divisions providing care, healthcare staffing, security and commercial cleaning. Choose the service you need.

fields._note: Four governed image-led columns. Order + approved hosts are enforced by the framework. Each image sits directly above its own title + Explore-more link (founder amendment). Images are provisional crops derived from the founder reference; replace the url per division with a licensed production asset before cutover.

image.alt: A Vigil care worker in a white tunic with navy neckline trim, offering warm, dignified non-clinical support.
A Vigil care professional in a white tunic with navy trim in a provider setting, representing care staff supplied to organisations.
A professional Vigil security officer in a calm, trustworthy posture in a commercial setting.
A Vigil commercial cleaning professional in a modern workplace environment.

fields.statement: At Vigil Services Ltd, we combine skilled people with high standards to deliver peace of mind.
